name: @buildalpha/capacitor-voice
description: Generic Capacitor plugin for VoIP calling via Twilio Voice + CallKit + PushKit. Solvr-blind — drop into any Capacitor app.
author: Jayden Kowaider <jayden@amanaoshc.com.au>

scripts.verify: npm run verify:ios && npm run verify:web
scripts.verify:ios: cd ios && pod install && xcodebuild -workspace Plugin.xcworkspace -scheme Plugin -destination generic/platform=iOS
